title: Stop and remove OpenClaw service
userStory: As an operator, I want OpenClaw stopped and its compose definition removed so that the VPS surface area shrinks.
acceptanceCriteria: Tagged commit immediately before the destructive change so revert is one git command
docker compose stop openclaw; docker compose rm openclaw
openclaw service block deleted from compose/docker-compose.yml
Caddyfile: any routes pointing to OpenClaw deleted
docker compose up -d applies the new state
Verify: docker compose ps shows no openclaw; no Caddy 502s; brainbot services healthy
